name: @clearline/domain-integrations
description: Pure, framework-agnostic accounting-integration rules (US-CW-039): the provider catalogue (QuickBooks/Xero/NetSuite display names + badge initials), GL-mapping completeness checks (unmapped-category detection driving the Partial-sync and amber-flag behaviour), and the sync-outcome derivation. No data-access or UI dependencies, mirrors libs/domain/cards.

metadata.scope: Domain lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-039 Accounting Integrations & Organization Notifications).
